title: ExecutionReceipt
description: A tamper-evident contract record linking a governance decision to the observed execution outcome and reconciliation state.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution receipt.

decision_id.description: Identifier of the governance Decision authorizing or blocking execution.

approval_id.description: Approval used for execution, when the decision required one.

execution_outcome.description: Observed lifecycle outcome for the target execution.

target_event_id.description: Native target-system event identifier used for reconciliation, when available.

reconciliation_status.description: Connector-defined reconciliation state. This value is intentionally extensible until the connector lifecycle contract defines a closed vocabulary.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the recorded outcome.

contractVersion.description: Semantic contract version. This package supports major version 1 and emits 1.0.0.
